review_summary.allowed_conclusion: This sample exercises the WGS evidence surfaces needed for HRD review. It remains a partial HRD evidence packet until allele-specific CNV/LOH, production SV calls, signature thresholds, CHORD/scarHRD/HRDetect policy, and known-answer performance are locked.

evidence.detail: Full-source FASTQs: True; read pairs per end: 942559447; BAM validation: passed.
Truth-depth eligible variants: 0; exact PASS matches: 0.
evidence.caveat: Public-BAM timing runs may skip local variant calling; do not infer HRD score readiness from this alone.
Coverage bins are not allele-specific CNV/LOH segments.
SBS3 interpretation remains no-call until thresholds and known-answer performance are locked.

evidence.detail: SV evidence rows: 2; discordant mapped pairs: 0; CHORD statuses: not_assessable_metadata_only.
evidence.caveat: CHORD and HRDetect need validated SV caller VCF/BEDPE, not metadata-only evidence.

evidence.detail: Candidate SV caller rows: 4; discordant mapped pairs in sidecar: 0; ready for clinical interpretation: no.
evidence.caveat: Use this as a readiness gate only after it agrees with the current SV evidence summary.

evidence.detail: CNV bins: 631; allele-specific segments available: no; ready for clinical interpretation: no.
evidence.caveat: Coverage bins remain a plumbing check, not scarHRD-ready allele-specific CNV/LOH evidence.

adapters.blocker: Classification is deferred for low mutation count; the matrix is a real VCF-derived output, not a proxy.
adapters.next_action: Promote to ready only after the required production adapter and known-answer validation pass.

adapters.blocker: scarHRD needs allele-specific segmented CN calls; this run validates WGS coverage-bin plumbing only.
adapters.next_action: Promote to ready only after the required production adapter and known-answer validation pass.

adapters.blocker: CHORD-style interpretation needs full-depth SNV/indel/SV/CNV feature inputs; this validates the feature lanes.
adapters.next_action: Promote to ready only after the required production adapter and known-answer validation pass.

adapters.blocker: SBS3 interpretation thresholds and known-answer performance are not locked.
adapters.next_action: validated SBS96/SBS288 mutation matrix plus reconstruction metrics and locked minimum-mutation policy

adapters.blocker: Allele-specific CNV/LOH segments are not available.
adapters.next_action: validated allele-specific copy-number segments with total/minor copy number purity and ploidy

adapters.blocker: Validated production SV caller VCF/BEDPE input is not available.
adapters.next_action: validated somatic SNV/indel features plus production SV caller VCF or BEDPE and CNV context

adapters.blocker: Integrated HRDetect-style feature classes and model calibration are not complete.
adapters.next_action: locked six-feature HRD model inputs including substitution signatures indel signatures rearrangement signatures and CNV/LOH features

blockers: Current SV evidence summary has no discordant mapped-pair counts; regenerate full SV evidence before using WGS as the flagship HRD packet.
